历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category has shifted from approximately 6791 → 9523 → 17907 → 20990 → 24769, with a continuous backward movement for 5 consecutive years, totaling about 17978 places; the pace has accelerated in the last 3 years (2023: +8384, 2024: +3083, 2025: +3779), with the 2025 baseline at about 24769; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 139 in 2021, 133 in 2022, 141 in 2023, 148 in 2024, and 142 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 139, a reduction of about 2.1% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; stable at about 22nd in the Soft Science main ranking, unchanged in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (the ongoing impact of the 'study partner' incident on public opinion); Douyin popularity ranking 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure; from 2022 to 2024, there have been multiple abnormal signals in admission cutoffs (e.g., a cutoff drop in Shaanxi, a 63-point drop in Sichuan science cutoffs), which have a lagging effect on application psychology; Mathematics A+ (flagship), Clinical Medicine A-, Control Science and Engineering A, strong disciplines related to Computer Science; a total of 19 disciplines rated A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, adjacent to Jiangsu Province, with high cross-provincial application popularity; the university's enrollment share in Jiangsu Province is about 21.7% (2025), making it one of the largest out-of-province sources, with strong willingness among Jiangsu candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 24769, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 2.1% (intensifying competition), the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 45.6% (markedly intensifying competition), a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin heat, top-tier school level, and strong appeal of flagship majors (Mathematics A+, Clinical Medicine, etc.), it is expected that the 2026 minimum admission ranking will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24555, with a range of 24055–25055.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1340 → 1300 → 3489 → 1181 → 1693. In 2023, an abnormally high ranking (3489) occurred due to the nursing major group, but it quickly recovered to 1181 in 2024 and rose to 1693 in 2025. The fluctuations in the past three years have been significant, with a baseline of about 1693 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 40 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 34 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 38, an increase of approximately 11.8% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; stable at around 22nd place on the Soft Science main ranking, with no recent changes in ranking, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (the ongoing impact of the 'study buddy' incident). Douyin popularity ranks 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure, indicating considerable attention from applicants. From 2022 to 2024, there were multiple abnormal signals in admission cutoffs (e.g., a gap in Shaanxi, a 63-point drop in Sichuan science cutoff), which have a lagging psychological impact on applicants. Mathematics is A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A. There are 19 disciplines rated A- or above, indicating strong academic strength, which strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category-related majors, Law is relatively popular, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Journalism & Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 521,000, with History Category estimated at about 141,400, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 97,100 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, adjacent to Jiangsu Province, with high cross-provincial application enthusiasm. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 21.7% (2025), making it one of the largest sources of out-of-province students, with strong willingness among Jiangsu examinees to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1693, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 11.8% (easing competition), the significant increase of about 45.6% in the number of History Category examinees in the province (intensifying competition), the somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin heat, and the top-tier university level, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly downward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1863, with a range of 1677–2049.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1600), you can prioritize reaching for top majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 2000), it is advisable to use majors like Business Administration and Public Administration as safety options.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 山东大学在江苏省医学类近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年6480名、2022年6556名、2023年3489名（该年含历史类护理学专业，拉低了整体位次）、2024年20990名、2025年24 769名。招生计划方面，2021-2022年均为12人，2023年扩至21人，2024年22人，2025年24人，呈逐年递增趋势。2026年招生计划进一步扩至27人（较2025年增加3人，增幅12.5%） ，扩招力度较大，将一定程度上缓解位次上行压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校（A类），综合实力雄厚，医学学科历史悠久，齐鲁医学品牌在全国具有较 高知名度和认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。山东大学医学类在江苏省投放计划逐年增加，但江苏省内考生对优质医学教育资源需求旺 盛，位次整体呈上升趋势。2026年扩招虽能部分缓解竞争，但医学热度不减，预计位次仍将小幅上移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年趋势修正，预测2026年山东大学在江苏省医学类最低录取位次约为26677名，波动区间预计在26277-27077名之间。较2025年24769名有所下降（位 次数字增大），主要受扩招12.5%影响，但医学持续高热使位次下降幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Shandong University's medical category in Jiangsu Province over the past five years are: 2021: 6480, 2022: 6556, 2023: 3489 (this year includes the nursing major from the history category, lowering the overall ranking), 2024: 20990, 2025: 24769. In terms of enrollment plans, 2021-2022 both had 12 students, expanded to 21 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 24 in 2025, showing a year-on-year increase. The 2026 enrollment plan further expands to 27 students (an increase of 3 from 2025, a 12.5% increase), a significant expansion that will alleviate upward ranking pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). It has strong comprehensive strength, a long history of medical disciplines, and the Qilu Medicine brand enjoys high visibility and recognition nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have seen continuously rising application popularity in recent years, with core majors like clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Although Shandong University's medical category has increased its enrollment plan in Jiangsu Province year by year, the demand for high-quality medical education resources among Jiangsu candidates is strong, and the overall ranking is on an upward trend. The 2026 expansion will partially alleviate competition, but the medical field remains highly popular, and the ranking is expected to rise slightly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and recent trend corrections, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical category in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is approximately 26677, with a fluctuation range expected between 26277 and 27077. Compared to the 2025 ranking of 24769, it has decreased (the ranking number has increased), mainly due to the 12.5% expansion, but the sustained high popularity of medicine limits the extent of the ranking decline.

Clinical medicine majors are the most competitive, followed by stomatology and pharmacy, while nursing has a relatively lower admission ranking and can be a stable choice.
